unit.name: core/rss block server renderer behavior
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 wp-includes/blocks/rss.php in PHP CLI with deterministic feed, block wrapper, escaping, date, option, action, and registration stubs. It observes render_block_core_rss and register_block_core_rss behavior without installed block editor behavior, client-side block rendering, live network feeds, database-backed feeds, full block registry integration, or generated public PHP replacement.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass installed block registry/rendering, editor/client behavior, live/recorded feed, selected upstream PHPUnit, and ecosystem fixtures before claiming public PHP ownership.
